description: Kakao provides consumer internet services including Kakao Talk and related platform capabilities for login, messaging, channels, local search, and notifications through its Kakao Developers program. Developers create apps in Kakao Developers to access these platform features.
summary: Kakao exposes a documented developer REST API on kapi.kakao.com authenticated with either Kakao OAuth user tokens or Kakao app keys, plus a known PlayMCP MCP endpoint at https://playmcp.kakao.com/mcp with undetermined auth from public docs.
